rationale.R1.6: The text has been polished with improved writing style and consistent register.
rationale.RX.1: While the output does not explicitly mark confidence or missing evidence for each claim, it does acknowledge uncertainty in some areas (e.g., sub-regional variation).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set as specified by the user.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (hedging) but does not introduce new errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.5: While every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, minor edits are not explicitly traced.
